# holistics_user (Data Source)

Look up a single Holistics user by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "holistics_user" "alice" {
  id = 123
}

output "alice_email" {
  value = data.holistics_user.alice.email
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) User ID.

### Read-Only

- `allow_authentication_token` (Boolean)
- `created_at` (String)
- `current_sign_in_at` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `enable_export_data` (Boolean)
- `group_ids` (Set of Number)
- `has_authentication_token` (Boolean)
- `initials` (String)
- `is_activated` (Boolean)
- `is_deleted` (Boolean)
- `job_title` (String)
- `last_sign_in_at` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `role` (String)
- `title` (String)
